calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Judgment Debtor Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents From Judgment Debtors Robin L. Diessner And Michael L. Kiessner And For An Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jason Saccuzzo, Atty. (telephonically) for Plaintiff and moving party:Sholdar Interiors, LLC; No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Sholdar Interiors LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Judgment Debtor Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents From Judgment Debtors is granted. No opposition has been filed. Judgment Debtor's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Judgment Debtor is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Judgment Debtor in the amount of $790, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
ATTY. RICHARD J. SCIARONI'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS ROBIN DIESSNER AND MICHAEL DIESSNER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR # 7077 =301/HEK
